ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the census data */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county in meters */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the county */,
  "county_type" TEXT /* Type of county (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of environmental data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "ghg_globalrank" INTEGER /* Global ranking of the county by greenhouse gas emissions */,
  "ghg_staterank" INTEGER /* State-level ranking of the county by greenhouse gas emissions */,
  "popden_globalrank" INTEGER /* Global ranking of the county by population density */,
  "popden_staterank" INTEGER /* State-level ranking of the county by population density */,
  "censusarea_globalrank" INTEGER /* Global ranking of the county by census area */,
  "censusarea_staterank" INTEGER /* State-level ranking of the county by census area */,
  "ghg_emissions" REAL /* Total greenhouse gas emissions in metric tons */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* Total CO2 emissions in metric tons */,
  "pm25_concentration" REAL /* PM2.5 concentration in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "ozone_concentration" REAL /* Ozone concentration in parts per billion */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the environmental data (e.g., EPA, local government) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_data" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of vehicle data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "vehicle_pc_BEV" REAL /* Percentage of Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) in the county */,
  "vehicle_pc_FFV" REAL /* Percentage of Flexible Fuel Vehicles (FFV) in the county */,
  "vehicle_pc_SIDI" REAL /* Percentage of Spark Ignition Direct Injection (SIDI) vehicles in the county */,
  "total_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles in the county */,
  "vehicle_registration_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest vehicle registration data */,
  "vehicle_data_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle data */,
  "vehicle_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the vehicle data (e.g., DMV, local government) */,
  "hydrogen_vehicles" REAL /* Percentage of hydrogen vehicles */,
  "diesel_vehicles" REAL /* Percentage of diesel vehicles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., environmental, vehicle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., environmental, vehicle, comparison) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
